title: Spiritual leader denies involvement in murder after allegations on social media
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Rocco Viljoen...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Update","html":"Breaking News\n Update"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Rocco Viljoen (58), a spiritual leader and a friend of the murdered former detective Nicky van Heerden (54), denies any involvement in her death, amid some recent insinuations to that effect on social media posts.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Rocco Viljoen (58), a spiritual leader and a friend of the murdered former detective Nicky van Heerden (54), denies any involvement in her death, amid some recent insinuations to that effect on social media posts."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Van Heerden’s body was discovered on a large area of dunes at Rivertides near Keurbooms River on Sunday evening, 18 January, after the police had responded to a report of a woman screaming."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An anti-crime activist, Morné Swart, who has a Facebook following of about 47 000, shared a photograph of Viljoen with the following message (translated from Afrikaans): “This man’s name is Rocco Viljoen, a cult leader in the Knysna area, and there is a direct connection between him and the murdered detective from Knysna. Before I send all my information to the authorities, I am asking for more details about this man, please. Feel free to inbox me. I am also in possession of a voice note that the murdered woman posted on a WhatsApp group the night before her murder. This tragedy is going to shock the country.”","html":"An anti-crime activist, Morné Swart, who has a Facebook following of about 47 000, shared a photograph of Viljoen with the following message (translated from Afrikaans): “This man’s name is Rocco Viljoen, a cult leader in the Knysna area, and there is a direct connection between him and the murdered detective from Knysna. Before I send all my information to the authorities, I am asking for more details about this man, please. Feel free to inbox me. I am also in possession of a voice note that the murdered woman posted on a WhatsApp group the night before her murder. This tragedy is going to shock the country.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Heerden had sent a voice note to a WhatsApp group administered by Viljoen at about 18:45 on Saturday evening, the day before her death. In it, she mentions Viljoen by name and warns his followers against him.","html":"Van Heerden had sent a voice note to a WhatsApp group administered by Viljoen at about 18:45 on Saturday evening, the day before her death. In it, she mentions Viljoen by name and warns his followers against him."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The voice note has since circulated on social media. Listeners are advised that the content may be disturbing. Listen to it here."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Heerden later sent an apology to the group.","html":"Van Heerden later sent an apology to the group."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more on sister publication, George Herald","html":"Read more on sister publication, George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Spiritual leader denies involvement in murder after allegations on social media
